metadata.name: Deathtouch — any amount of damage is lethal
metadata.description: A creature with deathtouch deals 1 damage to a blocker with 4 toughness. Due to deathtouch (CR 702.2), even 1 point of damage from a deathtouch creature is considered lethal. The blocker is destroyed. Tests that deathtouch bypasses the normal 'damage >= toughness' requirement for lethality.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.2b: Any amount of damage dealt by a source with deathtouch to a creature is enough to destroy it. The SBA check at CR 704.5g is modified by CR 702.2. Informational script.

script.step_note: Conceptual: attacker with deathtouch deals 1 damage to Wall of Omens (0/4).

actions.description: Initial: Llanowar Elves (1/1) vs Wall of Omens (0/4)
Combat damage: deathtouch creature deals 1 damage to Wall of Omens
actions.note: Attacker with deathtouch deals 1 damage to Wall of Omens.

actions.description: SBA: Wall of Omens has damage from a deathtouch source
actions.note: CR 702.2b + CR 704.5g: Any amount of damage from a deathtouch source is lethal. Wall of Omens is destroyed despite having 0/4 (only 1 damage marked, but deathtouch makes it lethal).
